rulings.Case Title: MAGCO DRILLING, INC. VS. NATOMA FAMILY HOUSING, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 6, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTs NATOMA FAMILY HOUSING and ST. JOSEPH'S FAMILY ASSOCIATES's MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES DENIED per CCP 2033.420 (b)(1). See Plaintiff's responses to the Requests at issue and Wimberly v. Derby Cycle Corp. (1997) 56 Cal.App.4th 618, American Federation of State v. Metropolitan Water Dist. (2005) 126 Cal.App.4th 247.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH H HUNT VS. EDWARD LITKE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points Andauthorjties; Supporting Declaration Of Michael Mccloskey; Supporting Declaration Of Burke Hansen
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 6, 2017 line 2. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH HUNT'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File First Amended Complaint Transferred to department 302 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on April 17, 2017. CCP 170.6 Challenge on file to the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To File First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 6, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC. and GILBERT "GIL" HODGES Motion To File First Amended Cross-Complaint DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1324.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 100 VAN NESS ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. BRYAN CHAUVEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 6, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs SCOTT NOLEN and JASON LALAK's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 100 VAN NESS ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. BRYAN CHAUVEL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 6, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs SCOTT NOLEN and JASON LALAK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Causes of action for aiding and abetting, fraud/deceit and breach of contract are sufficiently alleged.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT TAYAC VS. GUNTHER GOPP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings By Defendant Gunther Gopp On Complaint Plaintiff Robert Tayac
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 6, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT GUNTHER GOPP Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is DENIED as to the cause of action for trespass (this cause of action is sufficiently alleged. See Common Facts and paragraph 1 of First Cause of Action), nuisance (this cause of action is different from negligence cause of action as Plaintiff prays for punitive damages. See paragraph 2 of prayer. Motion is GRANTED without leave to amend as to cause of action for battery. Non-opposition filed. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend as to the cause of action for negligence per se for allegations to be incorporated into the cause of action for negligence and as to cause of action for negligent supervision as requested in opposition.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT TAYAC VS. GUNTHER GOPP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint Plaintiff Robert Tayac By Defendant Gunther Gopp
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 6, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT GUNTHER GOPP's Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to strike request for attorney's fees is GRANTED. Motion is otherwise denied.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT VS. DAVID LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 6, 2017 line 6. PLAINTIFF EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposing party failed to create a triable issue of fact with competent admissible evidence regarding impropriety of sale re: bankruptcy and reading of USC; or challenge to Plaintiff's title re: BFP status.= (501/REQ)
